declarations.description: Visual indicator tracking elements by selector
declarations.name: U2Spot

members.name: moveTo
members.description: Moves the spot to the given element

members.name: reset
members.description: Resets the spot to the fallback or hides it

members.name: updatePosition
members.description: Re-positions the spot on the current target

attributes.name: target
attributes.description: Selector of the elements to track (default: *)

attributes.name: active
attributes.description: Selector deciding which target is active (default: :hover)

attributes.name: fallback
attributes.description: Selector of the element to track when none is active

cssProperties.name: --target-border-radius
cssProperties.description: Read only! Border radius of the current target
